comment: State file for the daily news routine. Maps source id to the most recently seen item id or timestamp. The agent updates this on every successful run.

vllm-releases.note: v0.21.1rc0 tagged 2026-05-15; not published as it is a release candidate. Continue to monitor for v0.21.1 stable.

sglang-releases.note: v0.5.12.post1 (2026-05-23) is a post-release patch on the v0.5.12 line; processed but not published as a minor bugfix patch below the milestone bar.

mcp-blog.note: feed returned 404 on 2026-05-13; logged to fetch-errors.jsonl

interconnects.note: No new posts since the 2026-05-16 open-artifacts roundup as of 2026-05-25.

semianalysis.note: EDA Market Primer (2026-05-21) processed but not published; an EDA-tooling market analysis (Cadence, Synopsys, Siemens, China EDA), off-theme for the open-source AI stack and behind a paywall.

chips-and-cheese.note: Evaluating SPEC CPU2026 (2026-05-23) processed but not published; general-purpose CPU benchmark analysis (Intel Lion Cove, AMD Zen 5), not AI-accelerator or open-stack relevant.

latent-space.note: AINews-syndicated digests 'All Model Labs are now Agent Labs' (2026-05-23) and 'New AI Infra unicorns: Exa, Modal, TurboPuffer' (2026-05-22) processed but not published per the do-not-re-syndicate-AINews-digests rule. Daytona / Ivan Burazin podcast (2026-05-21) not published; a second agent-sandbox-infra interview close behind the 2026-05-21 Railway item.

lmarena-blog.note: feed at blog.lmarena.ai/feed.xml 301-redirects to arena.ai/blog/feed.xml; arena.ai/blog/feed.xml returned 404 on 2026-05-14; sources.yaml entry needs human investigation

apple-security-blog.note: feed returned 404 on 2026-05-13; logged to fetch-errors.jsonl

ollama-releases.note: v0.30.0-rc23 (2026-05-22), rc24 (2026-05-24), rc25 (2026-05-25) processed but not published: continuation of the v0.30.0 RC line already covered in 2026-05-18/19 issues. No stable v0.30.0 yet; rc24/rc25 are version-bump and CI fixes.

llama-cpp-releases.note: Nightlies b9266-b9330 (through 2026-05-25 PT) processed but not published; routine work without a clear milestone (fast Walsh-Hadamard CUDA transform, ffn_latent MUL_MAT buft-probe fix, tensor-parallel ggml context-size fix, parallel quant LUT init, cpp-httplib 0.45.1 bump, server checkpoint fixes, MTP kv-cache draft-type handling).

huggingface-blog.note: NVIDIA Nemotron-Labs Diffusion (nvidia/nemotron-labs-diffusion, 2026-05-23) published as weights item in 2026-05-25.mdx. 'Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right' (agent-glossary, 2026-05-25) and 'Specialization Beats Scale' (Dharma-AI, 2026-05-22) processed but not published: a terminology essay and a community opinion post, not releases.

anthropic-news.note: Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical (2026-05-25) processed but not published; co-founder commentary rather than a stack release. Project Glasswing (2026-05-22) lives under /research/ and was published from the anthropic-research source in 2026-05-25.mdx.

anthropic-research.note: Project Glasswing: An initial update (2026-05-22) published as safety-guardrails item in 2026-05-25.mdx (AI-assisted vulnerability discovery with the withheld Mythos Preview model; Claude Security public beta and a Cyber Verification Program announced).

ai2-blog.note: OlmoEarth v1.1 (2026-05-19) already published in 2026-05-21.mdx via the huggingface-blog cross-post. No newer AI2 posts as of 2026-05-25.

trl-releases.note: v1.5.0 (2026-05-25) published as training item in 2026-05-25.mdx (chat templates for Phi-3.5/Qwen3-VL/Qwen3.5, async-GRPO final logits softcapping, KTO/DPO loss alignment, opt-out telemetry).

openhands-releases.note: cloud-1.32.2 and cloud-1.33.0 (both 2026-05-21) changed the default model configuration to MiniMax-M2.7; processed but not published as minor configuration updates.

nvidia-dev-blog.note: Synthesize Realistic 3D Medical Images at Scale (2026-05-22) processed but not published; a synthetic-data tutorial for medical imaging, not a stack release.

qwen-blog.note: qwen.ai/blog returned a near-empty page on 2026-05-14; needs human investigation of the scrape source.

qdrant-blog.note: qdrant.tech/blog/feed.xml returned 404 on 2026-05-14; logged to fetch-errors.jsonl. First failure for this source.

goose-blog.note: block.github.io/goose/blog/rss.xml returned 404 on 2026-05-14; logged to fetch-errors.jsonl.

prime-intellect-blog.note: Systematic Reward Hacking and Prime Sprints (2026-05-20) published as safety-guardrails item in 2026-05-21.mdx. No newer posts as of 2026-05-25.

nemo-guardrails-releases.note: v0.22.0 (2026-05-22) published as safety-guardrails item in 2026-05-25.mdx (LangChain decoupling with built-in OpenAI-compatible client, IORails milestone 2 streaming/OpenTelemetry/reasoning support, opt-in anonymous usage reporting).

weaviate-blog.note: Build a Coding Assistant with Weaviate MCP (2026-05-21) processed but not published; a how-to tutorial rather than a release.

letta-blog.note: Most recent post is Red-teaming the Context Constitution (2026-05-06); no new posts as of 2026-05-25.

artificial-analysis-news.note: Changelog additions 2026-05-21 through 2026-05-25 are benchmark entries for closed models (Grok 4.3 medium/low, Grok Code Fast 1, Gemini 3.5 Flash) and proprietary image models (Recraft V4.1); processed but not published, off-theme for the open-source stack.

nous-research.note: Blog scrape exposes no post dates. Most prominent listed item, Hermes 4.3, verified via Hugging Face model pages (NousResearch/Hermes-4.3-36B updated 2025-12-06; GGUF and -centralized variants 2025-12-03) to be a December 2025 release, not in this window. No verifiable new item; not published.

grants_watch_frontier-model-forum-update.note: No new items since 2026-05-13. A 'Progress Update' follow-on to the information-sharing agreement is visible but undated and not a grant.

grants_watch_nlnet-news.note: No new news items since 2026-05-13. Office hour event on 2026-05-27 is not a grant announcement.

grants_watch_nsf-news-ai.note: Queued NSF X-Labs $1.5B/decade initiative (2026-05-14) as low-confidence: AI/open-source relevance not confirmed from listing, needs human read of the announcement.

grants_watch_schmidt-sciences-opportunit.note: No new items. Currently listed: VIEW-2 EOIs, 2026 AI Interpretability RFP, 2026 Science of Trustworthy AI RFP, all previously known.

grants_watch_schmidt-sciences-announceme.note: No new items since 2026-05-13. Most recent post 2026-04-30 (carbon cycle).

grants_watch_mozilla-foundation-press.note: No new items since 2026-05-13. Fetched listing returned older posts; redirect to mozillafoundation.org/en/blog observed. Worth re-checking if signal expected.

grants_watch_mozilla-builders-blog.note: https://builders.mozilla.org/blog/ still 404 on 2026-05-18. URL needs human re-sourcing.

grants_watch_sovereign-tech-agency-news.note: Both sovereigntechfund.de/news and sovereign.tech/news returned 403 on 2026-05-18 (bot-block). Could not verify new items; sources.yaml feed URL needs an alternative path or auth method.

grants_watch_anthropic-news-funding.note: Queued Gates Foundation $200M partnership (2026-05-14) as low-confidence edge case. PwC expanded partnership (2026-05-14) is not a grant.

grants_watch_openai-index-funding.note: https://openai.com/index/ and /news/ still return 403 on 2026-05-18. No new visibility.

grants_watch_open-philanthropy-grants.note: Open Philanthropy URL now 301-redirects to coefficientgiving.org which also returns 403. Org appears rebranded to Coefficient Giving. grants-sources.yaml entry needs human update.

grants_watch_huggingface-blog-grants.note: Three new posts (Open Agent Leaderboard 2026-05-18, Granite Embedding R2 2026-05-14, continuous_async 2026-05-14) are all project/model releases, not grants.

grants_watch_granted-ai.note: Recent items are forestry, cultural districts, CAL FIRE workforce. No AI-stack-relevant grants surfaced this week.

grants_watch_opportunity-desk.note: Recent items in environment, business, agriculture, public health, education, arts, peace/security. None AI-stack-relevant.

grants_watch_lesswrong-funding.note: Two new funding-adjacent posts on 2026-05-18 are Anthropic Fellows research outputs, not grant announcements.

grants_watch_eu-horizon-news.note: Commission opens feedback on draft high-risk AI classification guidelines (2026-05-19) published as governance item in 2026-05-21.mdx. EU-Africa AI cooperation event (2026-05-21) processed but not published; an event recap without named concrete agreements.

grants_watch_aisi-uk-grants.note: Page unchanged. All programmes still show 'Applications closed.'
